[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)
- Amount: 0
- Description: Blog revision: expanded Plug-and-Play architecture post with repo links and accessibility
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/50
  
  Details:
  Expanded the Plug-and-Play Architecture blog post to be more detailed and accessible to non-technical readers.
  
  ## What changed
  - Added "shared notebook" analogy for non-developers (kitchen co-op metaphor)
  - Broke the funnel into 4 concrete steps with links to 11 GitHub repos
  - Added "A real example: Gary records a cacao sale" — 6-step walkthrough showing the full pipeline from DApp → Edgar → Sheet → GAS → GitHub Action → agroverse.shop
  - Expanded consumer services section with specific repo + file pointers
  - Explained RSA signatures via "wax seal" analogy
  - Explained L3/L4 blockchain layers via "newspaper photograph" analogy
  - Added a real Python code snippet from dao_client showing how developers consume the cache
  - Expanded References section from 4 to 11 specific repo links with file pointers
  
  ## Accessibility goal
  The post now works for both audiences: non-technical readers get analogies and concrete stories; technical readers get repo links, file paths, and code snippets.
  
  ## GitHub
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/50
